narrative:
Worthington Twp township has 1,937 registered voters, with 49.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
